channel.title: URL Error
channel.description: My Blog works fine until someone try to visit a specific post using Direct Link. my Blog https://blog.ddeb.me , can be visited without any issue . But if someone wanna visit https://blog.ddeb.me/2012/07/23/স্কুল-জীবনে-আমার-নস্টালজ/ Then internal error occurred. Why??? please help me. Note: It doesn't happen if the Post title is English.

item.title: URL Error
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @debashishdab,

Can you please provide a repo or code-sandbox with your code? This is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code

It seems this is not happening with any other route like:

  • https://blog.ddeb.me/2012/05/27/আসেন-পিএইচপি-দিয়ে-ওয়েব-পে/

Maybe this is an issue with the content of that specific post?

Read full topic

item.title: URL Error
item.dc:creator: debashishdab
item.description:
My Blog works fine until someone try to visit a specific post using Direct Link.
my Blog https://blog.ddeb.me , can be visited without any issue .
But if someone wanna visit https://blog.ddeb.me/2012/07/23/স্কুল-জীবনে-আমার-নস্টালজ/ Then internal error occurred.
Why???
please help me.
Note: It doesn’t happen if the Post title is English.

Read full topic
